content.en:
Before coming to the Holy Soul Realm, Ye Tian also learned about the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Domain of the Dark Holy Domain's major holy gates, unless it was a hidden Supreme Domain Ancestor, he knew all the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Domain List.

And the two Supreme Domain Ancestors who were perceived were not the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Dark Holy Gate Supreme Strength List, so their strength should not be strong.

"Black Scale Holy Fruit!"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate also saw the Black Scale Holy Fruit, and immediately showed a look of greed.

The value of this thing is very high, and they are naturally more eager for it, refining it by themselves is more wasteful, and it can be traded to those supreme domain ancestors who are difficult to impact the invincible domain ancestors, and they can definitely sell it for a very high price.

These two Supreme Domain Ancestors also discovered Ye Tian, and they were a little unsure of Ye Tian's strength.

Although they were very confident in their own strength, none of the Supreme Domain Ancestors who entered the Holy Soul Realm this time were weak, even the Supreme Domain Ancestors of some Holy Lands were also very strong, not necessarily weaker than the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Strength List, even stronger than them.

Therefore, it is better to be careful.

"Your Excellency, how about three black-scaled holy fruits, one for each person?"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors asked.

"Deal with this stone python first!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Good!"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate also sensed the stone python, and at the same time, they also discovered the three Supreme Domain Ancestors who had been petrified.

However, they estimated that these three Supreme Domain Ancestors should be relatively weak Supreme Domain Ancestors, and as the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate, their strength was very close to the combat power of the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme List, so they were not afraid of the stone python.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian and the three of them shot together and attacked the stone python.

At this moment, the stone python made a move.

Wow!

A white light streaked through, and the attacks of the three were directly petrified.

At the same time, the stone python burst out with a terrifying aura, shattering the void with a single blow.

"It's not good, the strength of this stone python is comparable to the seven-step invincible domain ancestor!"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate were stunned.

The Seven-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor is not weak, although they can kill the weaker Invincible Domain Ancestor by leaping over the level, but they can't compete with the Seven-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Before, they thought that the Holy Soul Beasts of this world were not proficient in holy techniques, and their combat power was not as good as that of a genius, even if they became an invincible domain ancestor, they should not be able to threaten them.

But they knew that they had miscalculated, and the strength of this stone python was terrifying.

"Retreat!"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate immediately made a decision.

However, just when they wanted to retreat, Ye Tian cast the Five Elements Forbidden and blocked the void.

Suddenly, the two of them couldn't run.

"What do you mean, and why are you stopping us, and if you don't run away, you, too, will die!"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate said angrily.

"No, it's you who died, not me!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

If it is the strongest domain ancestor of other forces, it would be fine, but they are the strongest domain ancestor of the Dark Holy Gate, and the relationship between the Battle Gate and the Dark Holy Gate is very poor, and even the Fire Emblem War Ancestor said that when they encounter the strongest domain ancestor of the Dark Holy Gate, they will kill them if they can kill them.

Therefore, he would not let go of these two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate.

"No!"

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Holy Gate frantically attacked Ye Tian, but before they could make a few moves, the Stone Python's petrified holy endowment covered the two Supreme Domain Ancestors.

For the first time, they resisted the petrified Endowment, but they also used up their life-saving things.

The second time, they failed to resist, and were directly petrified, and their vitality gradually disappeared.

......

Outside the primordial ancestral realm.

In the darkness, a figure hovered here.

He is the ancestor of the Dark Gate, the Dark Ancestor, of course, only a doppelganger, not an entity.

The Dark Ancestor opened his eyes, and he sensed that the two Supreme Domain Ancestor Soul Cards of the Dark Holy Gate were shattered, and he couldn't help but mutter: "The two Supreme Domain Ancestors died, and they fell not long after they entered, what a waste!"

He didn't care too much, the two Supreme Domain Ancestors who died were not the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Strength List, and he was not distressed no matter how many people fell.

Ye Tianben didn't need to use the power of the stone python to kill these two supreme domain ancestors, he could easily kill them, but in order to understand the strength of the stone python, he did so.

"The combat power of the seven-step invincible domain ancestor is not bad!"

Ye Tian smiled, not panicking at all.

A long time ago, he fought with the two five-step invincible domain ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land that day, and they both killed them.

At that time, although he used the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, his true strength had definitely reached the combat power of the invincible domain ancestor of seven or eight steps.

Now, his soul holy light has increased a lot, and his combat power has definitely stepped into the combat power of the six-step invincible domain ancestor.

With a six-step invincible domain ancestor, it is not very difficult to kill a seven-step invincible domain ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a move, and continued to bombard the stone python's huge body with the Void Slashing Saint Technique.

Click!!!

The scales on the stone python's body continued to shatter under the attack of the Void Slash Holy Technique, and countless blood erupted.

I saw that the stone python's injuries were constantly healing, and the recovery speed was very fast, this was not because it had a special means of recovery, but as an invincible domain ancestor's instinctive recovery ability.

The recovery ability of the Invincible Domain Ancestor is very fast, and unless the difference in strength is indeed too large, it will take a long time to kill an Invincible Domain Ancestor.

"Kill!"

Countless golden silk threads surrounded the stone python, this was Ye Tian's golden silk holy technique, although the power was not as good as the void slash, but it could attack continuously, and the effect would be better.

Under the attack of Ye Tian's Sect Saint Technique, the stone python could not resist at all, and its petrification ability could not petrify Ye Tian, it was directly blocked by Ye Tian's several extreme realm defensive holy techniques, even if a trace of petrification power invaded Ye Tian's body, it would be restored by the Immortal Saint Technique.

Therefore, its methods were useless to Ye Tian.

A few months later, this stone python was killed by Ye Tianmo.

"It's a pity, the strength of this stone python is also very close to the six-step invincible domain ancestor, if it will be a petrified holy technique, the power will even exceed the six-step invincible domain ancestor, if you really want to cultivate a petrified holy technique to an extremely high level, the combat power will reach the level of four or five steps invincible domain ancestor in an instant!"

Ye Tian commented.

However, there is no if, the Holy Soul Beasts of this world cannot leave, and it is also thanks to the rules of this world that they can give birth to the Holy Endowment.

Therefore, there are gains and losses.

But for Ye Tian, this world is the real place of great opportunity.

"Strive to replicate the martial arts endowment as soon as possible, and see if there can be a qualitative change after the fusion!"

After Ye Tian picked the three Black Lin Holy Fruits, he left here.
